info.title: nemotron-base-model-generation
info.description:
See [nemotron.huikang.dev](https://nemotron.huikang.dev/) for the data visualization.

This is generated with the base model `Nemotron-3-Nano-30B-A3B-BF16`.

Read the [discussion thread](https://www.kaggle.com/competitions/nvidia-nemotron-model-reasoning-challenge/discussion/684212) for more context.
